reason: Backend checklist for core job, gift allocation, Docker runtime, and quality expectations.
Defines boundaries for src/core job logic, Docker WebUI runtime, and backpack status contracts.
Double-card gift sending and backpack lookup failures must preserve explicit actionable errors.
Double-card logs must explain gift groups and room-level send behavior without exposing secrets.
Implementation must follow TypeScript quality and required lint/type-check expectations.
WebUI changes belong in Docker html.ts and must not reintroduce legacy frontend paths.
The task should reuse existing backpack grouping and allocation helpers instead of duplicating logic.
Gift scope config flows through config defaults, runtime job logic, API data, and WebUI controls.
